'''âr-n-g''' ('''ranaga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:preacknowledge|preacknowledge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:preacknowledge|preacknowledge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-n-g
|-
! Lemma
| ranaga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ranagithi|ranagithi]] || [[word:ranagiji|ranagiji]] || [[word:ranagishi|ranagishi]] || [[word:ranagi|ranagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ranaguthuth|ranaguthuth]] || [[word:ranagujuj|ranagujuj]] || [[word:ranagushush|ranagushush]] || [[word:ranag|ranag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ranaguthu|ranaguthu]] || [[word:ranaguju|ranaguju]] || [[word:ranagushu|ranagushu]] || [[word:ranagu|ranagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ranagufuth|ranagufuth]] || [[word:ranagufuj|ranagufuj]] || [[word:ranagufush|ranagufush]] || [[word:ranaguf|ranaguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ranagethe|ranagethe]] || [[word:ranageje|ranageje]] || [[word:ranageshe|ranageshe]] || [[word:ranage|ranage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ranagothoth|ranagothoth]] || [[word:ranagojoj|ranagojoj]] || [[word:ranagoshosh|ranagoshosh]] || [[word:ranag|ranag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ranagotho|ranagotho]] || [[word:ranagojo|ranagojo]] || [[word:ranagosho|ranagosho]] || [[word:ranago|ranago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ranagofoth|ranagofoth]] || [[word:ranagofoj|ranagofoj]] || [[word:ranagofosh|ranagofosh]] || [[word:ranagof|ranagof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ranagĂŠthĂŠ|ranagĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ranagĂŠjĂŠ|ranagĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ranagĂŠshĂŠ|ranagĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ranagĂŠ|ranagĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ranagathath|ranagathath]] || [[word:ranagajaj|ranagajaj]] || [[word:ranagashash|ranagashash]] || [[word:ranag|ranag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ranagatha|ranagatha]] || [[word:ranagaja|ranagaja]] || [[word:ranagasha|ranagasha]] || [[word:ranaga|ranaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ranagafath|ranagafath]] || [[word:ranagafaj|ranagafaj]] || [[word:ranagafash|ranagafash]] || [[word:ranagaf|ranagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ranagasha|ranagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goranagasha|goranagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiranagasha|gokiranagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ranagnĂŒsha|ranagnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goranagnknĂŒsha|goranagnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiranagnĂŒsha|gokiranagnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ranagshĂ«sha|ranagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goranagnkshĂ«sha|goranagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiranagshĂ«sha|gokiranagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ranagrosha|ranagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goranagnkrosha|goranagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiranagrosha|gokiranagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ranagmusha|ranagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goranagnkmusha|goranagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiranagmusha|gokiranagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ranagsherasha|ranagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goranagnksherasha|goranagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiranagsherasha|gokiranagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ranagngasha|ranagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goranagnkngasha|goranagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiranagngasha|gokiranagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ranagyasha|ranagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goranagnkyasha|goranagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiranagyasha|gokiranagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ranagyamasha|ranagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goranagnkyamasha|goranagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiranagyamasha|gokiranagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ranagnĂŒshĂ«sha|ranagnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goranagnknĂŒshĂ«sha|goranagnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiranagnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiranagnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ranagnĂŒrosha|ranagnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goranagnknĂŒrosha|goranagnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiranagnĂŒrosha|gokiranagnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ranagnĂŒmusha|ranagnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goranagnknĂŒmusha|goranagnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiranagnĂŒmusha|gokiranagnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ranagshĂ«nĂŒsha|ranagshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goranagnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goranagnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiranagshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiranagshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ranagshĂ«rosha|ranagshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goranagnkshĂ«rosha|goranagnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiranagshĂ«rosha|gokiranagshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ranagshĂ«musha|ranagshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goranagnkshĂ«musha|goranagnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiranagshĂ«musha|gokiranagshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ranagronĂŒsha|ranagronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goranagnkronĂŒsha|goranagnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiranagronĂŒsha|gokiranagronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ranagroshĂ«sha|ranagroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goranagnkroshĂ«sha|goranagnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiranagroshĂ«sha|gokiranagroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ranagromusha|ranagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goranagnkromusha|goranagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiranagromusha|gokiranagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ranagmunĂŒsha|ranagmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goranagnkmunĂŒsha|goranagnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiranagmunĂŒsha|gokiranagmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ranagmushĂ«sha|ranagmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goranagnkmushĂ«sha|goranagnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiranagmushĂ«sha|gokiranagmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ranagmurosha|ranagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goranagnkmurosha|goranagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiranagmurosha|gokiranagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ranag|ranag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:rĂŠnĂŠg|rĂŠnĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horanag|horanag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:horĂŠnĂŠg|horĂŠnĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoranag|hohoranag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorĂŠnĂŠg|hohorĂŠnĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒranag|nĂŒranag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒrĂŠnĂŠg|nĂŒrĂŠnĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒranag|nĂŒnĂŒranag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠnĂŠg|nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠnĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻranag|nĂŻranag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻrĂŠnĂŠg|nĂŻrĂŠnĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻranag|nĂŻnĂŻranag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠnĂŠg|nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠnĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luranag|luranag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lurĂŠnĂŠg|lurĂŠnĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluranag|luluranag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurĂŠnĂŠg|lulurĂŠnĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liranag|liranag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lirĂŠnĂŠg|lirĂŠnĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliranag|liliranag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirĂŠnĂŠg|lilirĂŠnĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koranag|koranag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:korĂŠnĂŠg|korĂŠnĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoranag|kokoranag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorĂŠnĂŠg|kokorĂŠnĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keranag|keranag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kerĂŠnĂŠg|kerĂŠnĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeranag|kekeranag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerĂŠnĂŠg|kekerĂŠnĂŠg]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
